overview: A full-stack AI prompt library where users can browse, view, and create AI image generation prompts. Each prompt has a title, content, and complexity rating. View counts are tracked live every time a prompt is opened.
features: Browse all saved prompts with color-coded complexity badges
Prompt detail view with live view counter that increments on each visit
Create new prompts with a validated form (title, content, complexity)
Real-time form validation with inline error messages
Navigate between list, detail, and create pages
